name: demo2codex
description: Local-first Codex plugin that grounds demo feedback in repository modules and produces concise Chinese TODOs.

scripts.check: node --check ./mcp/server.mjs && node --check ./mcp/lib/code-context.mjs && node --check ./mcp/lib/http-server.mjs && node --check ./mcp/lib/repository-snapshot.mjs && node --check ./mcp/lib/session-store.mjs && node --check ./mcp/lib/translation-constraints.mjs && node --check ./web/app.js && node --check ./web/embed.js
